articles.title: Zero-day exploit completely defeats default Windows 11 BitLocker protections
articles.content: It's not entirely clear how the exploit works. Microsoft says it's investigating.
articles.titleZh: 零日漏洞完全击败默认的Windows 11 BitLocker保护
articles.contentZh: 目前尚不完全清楚漏洞是如何运作的。微软表示正在进行调查。

articles.title: Cisco announces record revenue and 4,000 layoffs in the same day
articles.content: Layoffs are "not a savings-driven restructure," CFO says.
articles.titleZh: 思科在同一天宣布创纪录的收入和4000次裁员
articles.contentZh: 首席财务官表示，裁员“不是由储蓄驱动的重组”。

articles.title: Linux bitten by second severe vulnerability in as many weeks
articles.content: Production-version patches are coming online and should be installed pronto.
articles.titleZh: Linux在多周内被第二次严重漏洞咬伤
articles.contentZh: 生产版补丁即将上线，应立即安装。

articles.title: Chaos erupts as cyberattack disrupts learning platform Canvas amid finals
articles.content: Across the country, schools and colleges postpone year-end tests.
articles.titleZh: 随着网络攻击在决赛中扰乱学习平台Canvas ，混乱爆发
articles.contentZh: 在全国范围内，学校和学院推迟了年终考试。

articles.title: Marshall brings ANC back to its smaller on-ear wireless headphones
articles.content: Marshall's first headphones with active noise canceling were the Marshall Mid A.N.C. first launched in 2018. Its current lineup only offers noise canceling on its larger over-ear Monitor III A.N.C. headphones, but its new Milton A.N.C. bring the feature back to Marshall's smaller and lighter on-ear options. The wireless headphones are available today for $229.99 […]
articles.titleZh: Marshall将ANC带回其较小的入耳式无线耳机
articles.contentZh: Marshall的第一款具有主动降噪功能的耳机是Marshall Mid A.N.C. ，于2018年首次推出。其目前的阵容仅在其较大的头戴式Monitor III A.N.C.耳机上提供降噪功能，但其新的Milton A.N.C.将该功能带回了Marshall更小更轻的头戴式耳机选项。无线耳机今天售价$ 229.99 […]

articles.title: These are the robot vacuum-mops I recommend for every type of home
articles.content: Inviting a robot vacuum-mop into your life is a big decision. An autonomous floor-cleaning machine roaming your home is equal parts glorious and intrusive. But if it does its job well, you may forgive it for eating your rug tassel, running over your Apple Watch, smearing strawberry jam across your carpet, or chattering to you […]
articles.titleZh: 这些是我为每种类型的房源推荐的机器人吸尘器
articles.contentZh: 邀请机器人吸尘器进入您的生活是一个重大决定。无人驾驶地板清洁机在您的家中漫游，既美观又具有侵入性。但如果它做得很好，你可能会原谅它吃你的地毯流苏，跑过你的Apple Watch ，在地毯上涂抹草莓果酱，或者对你喋喋不休[…]
